docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-26-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALLAGHER, SHANNON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JALILI, KAM THE CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GALLAGHER, SHANNON AS TO DEFENDANT JALILI, KAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PERSONAL SERVICE DELIVERED TO THE PARTY AUTHORIZED TO RECEIVED PROCESS FOR THE PARTY. SERVED DEC-10-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JALILI, KAM
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALLAGHER, SHANNON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFNEDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED".
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-06-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
